    1. blocking(ReactiveIndexOperations)

Interface IndexOperationsAdapter

All Superinterfaces:
IndexOperations
public interface IndexOperationsAdapter extends IndexOperations
Adapter for creating synchronous calls for a reactive ReactiveIndexOperations.
Since:
5.2
Author:
Peter-Josef Meisch
